name: codex-skin-pack-installer
description: Install and stage verified public-safe Codex desktop skin packs with validation and restore guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Install verified Codex desktop skin packs.
interface.longDescription: Stages public-safe Codex desktop skin packs from GitHub releases, validates theme.json/background.png, avoids private screenshots, and keeps restore guidance visible before finishing.
defaultPrompt: Install the caishen-lite Codex skin pack.
